case_title: VALLEE JACQUES F. VS THE PRUDENTIAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED LETTER TO DONALD A. KINNEY C/O THE PRUDENTIAL INS. RETURN SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY VALLEE JACQUES F. AS TO DEFENDANT THE PRUDENTIAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLEE JACQUES F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PRUDENTIAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA $720.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $740.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
